Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9048 "FLUNKY-C900-9048" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c900 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Flunky.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $C900 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
